title: Perspectives in regenerative medicine and tissue engineering of bone.
author_string: Ripamonti, Ugo, Tsiridis, Eleftherios, Ferretti, Carlo, Kerawala, Cyrus J, Mantalaris, Athanasios et al.
journal_full: The British journal of oral & maxillofacial surgery
abstract: This final review in a series of three focuses on how the advances made in the realm of molecular and cellular bone biology have been translated into experimental animal and human surgery.
